'''''Oo-Ta Goo-Ta''''' was a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] owned and operated by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Chordak]]. Known as one of the fastest ships in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]], Chordak hoped to catch the attention of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with his ship and receive more valuable Imperial assignments like the regular run to the prison to [[Gesaril]].

==Behind the scenes==
Phonetically, "Oo-Ta Goo-Ta" closely resembles the first two words spoken by [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], as [[Gender/Legends|he]] confronts [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the [[1977]] film {{Film|IV}}.<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> The short story "[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]" presents Greedo's famous line as "''Oona goota'', Solo?"<ref name="Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina">{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref> ("Going somewhere, Solo?")<ref name="ANH" /><ref name="Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina" /> and implies that Greedo is speaking [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]],<ref name="Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina" /> whereas the reference book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']] establishes the spelling as "''Koona t'chuta'', Solo?" and clarifies that Greedo is actually speaking [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]].<ref name="Galactic Phrase">[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]</ref>
